releaseNotes:
_Date: 2026-03-31_

---

### ✨ What's New in v1.0.2

#### 💬 Refreshed Chat Design
The chat experience has been completely redesigned with a **modern bubble layout**, giving conversations a cleaner, more natural feel. Messages are easier to read at a glance, with better spacing and visual polish throughout.

#### ⚡ Slash Command Autocomplete
Type `/` in the chat input and get instant autocomplete suggestions for all available commands — no more guessing what's available.

#### 🔐 Microsoft Sign-In
You can now **sign in with your Microsoft account** directly inside Compass Partner using a secure OAuth + PKCE flow — no copy-pasting tokens required.

#### 🛒 Smarter Marketplace
- Installed skills are now shown in **read-only view** so you always know what's active.
- Skills that bundle multiple files now download everything in one go.
- Marketplace skill pages include **markdown preview** and better overall UI.
- CLI tools are detected and managed automatically from the Marketplace.

#### 🔋 Performance Settings
A new **Performance** section in Settings lets you control power-saving behaviour and fine-tune background activity to keep your machine running smoothly.

#### 🌐 Improved Portal Connectivity
Remote execution protocol updated to **v1.1** with more reliable session handling and better support for running commands from the portal.

---

### 🛠 Improvements

- **Friendlier error messages** — when Compass is overloaded or rate-limited, you'll now see a clear, helpful message instead of a raw error.
- **Chat menu decluttered** — the top bar has been replaced with a floating **⋯ menu** so your conversation takes centre stage.
- **Faster onboarding** — removed artificial delays from the CLI setup flow so you get up and running quicker.
- **Chat scroll reliability** — instant scroll behaviour and smarter initial positioning when opening long conversations.
- **Larger chat input area** — more breathing room when composing longer messages.

---

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed a race condition that could cause session replay notifications to be routed incorrectly.
- Fixed connection drop issues — reconnection after idle periods is now significantly more reliable, with improved heartbeat handling.

---

### ⚙️ Under the Hood

- WebSocket protocol updated to **v2.0** with improved reliability and session management.
- Internal session replay and ACP routing hardened against edge-case failures.
